overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy game showing a character exploring a Gothic-style common room with a fireplace, ascending spiral staircases through stone corridors, and entering a dormitory to sleep. The environment features warm firelight, wood paneling, and medieval stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: Sitting in the leather armchair by the fireplace, enjoying the warmth before standing up at the end of the segment

entered.detail: Large stone hearth with active fire burning inside
Worn leather chair positioned beside the fireplace
Lit table lamp with green glass shade on side table
Oriental-style red rug covering the wooden floor
Tall dark wood shelves filled with books

segments.scene_description: A cozy Gothic common room illuminated by a crackling fireplace. The camera focuses on the stone hearth and leather seating area, with warm firelight casting shadows across the wooden paneling and red rugs.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled common room with portrait gallery

events.description: Character stands up from the armchair and begins walking through the common room

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily through the common room toward the exit staircase, passing framed portraits on the walls

entered.detail: Heavy wooden door leading to the corridor and staircase
Gilded frames containing portraits hanging on the wood-paneled walls
Bulletin board covered with papers and notices
Long red carpet running along the wooden floor
Grand staircase with wooden banisters leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character stands up from the armchair and walks through the wood-paneled common room. They pass framed portraits and a notice board as they head toward the exit staircase, with the camera following in third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone spiral staircase and upper corridors

events.description: Entering the narrow stone spiral staircase from the main corridor

agents.ego_description: Climbing the worn stone steps of the spiral staircase and walking through Gothic corridors

entered.detail: Winding stone staircase with wooden steps curving upward
Gothic stone arch with carved details
Decorative fabric hanging depicting medieval scenes
Tall narrow window with stone tracery showing night sky
Heavy wooden door with iron studs leading to the dormitory

segments.scene_description: Ascending through a narrow stone spiral staircase illuminated by wall sconces. The character climbs the worn steps and passes through Gothic archways, transitioning from the wooden common room to the stone corridor architecture.

events.description: Opening the wooden door and entering the circular dormitory room
Character approaches the bed and interacts with it to initiate sleeping

agents.ego_description: Entering the dormitory and walking toward the four-poster bed to sleep

entered.detail: Wooden four-poster bed with red curtains and white bedding
Tall dark wood wardrobe with carved details
Wooden desk with books and a lit lamp
Crimson house banners hanging from the high ceiling
Tall windows showing the night sky outside

segments.scene_description: Opening a heavy wooden door reveals a circular dormitory with four-poster beds and red house banners. The character enters the room, walks past wooden wardrobes and study desks, and approaches the bed to interact with it.

scene_state.functional_zone: dormitory at night with sleeping character

events.description: Character lies down in bed and camera becomes static, showing the sleeping UI

agents.ego_description: Character is now sleeping in the four-poster bed, camera stationary

segments.scene_description: The character lies down to sleep in the four-poster bed. The camera remains static, showing the dimly lit dormitory with a 'Sleeping' UI element appearing on screen, indicating the game mechanic is active.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a warm, cozy common room through a cold stone ascent and into a quiet dormitory. It begins focused on a crackling fireplace and leather seating, before following the character as they stand and walk past framed portraits and a notice board toward the exit. The scene then shifts from wood paneling to cold stone as the camera ascends a narrow spiral staircase illuminated by wall sconces and Gothic archways. Upon opening a heavy wooden door, the environment expands into a circular dormitory filled with four-poster beds and red house banners. Finally, the camera settles into a static position as the character lies down to sleep, with a Sleeping UI element appearing over the dimly lit room.
